quests.name: Freshman Orientation
quests.description: You've just stepped onto the university campus. Everything is new. Take a deep breath and begin your college adventure!

choices.text: Explore the campus and get familiar with the surroundings

quests.name: Course Selection Week
quests.description: It's course selection week. You need to decide your academic direction for this semester. Different choices will affect your academics and social life.

choices.text: Pick hardcore courses (high difficulty, high reward)

quests.name: Club Recruitment
quests.description: Club fair! Every club on campus is recruiting new members. Joining a club expands your social circle, but also requires commitment.

quests.name: Midterm Exam
quests.description: Half the semester has passed, and midterms have arrived. You feel a bit nervous, but this is also a chance to test what you've learned.
quests.subject: Core Subjects

quests.name: Advanced Club Activities
quests.description: After midterms, club activities enter a deeper phase. You're now a core member of your club.

choices.text: Compete in a club tournament for glory

quests.name: Final Exam
quests.description: End of the semester -- the most critical final exam is here! All your hard work comes down to this moment. Take a deep breath and focus.
quests.subject: Major Comprehensive

quests.name: Graduation Ceremony
quests.description: Four years of college have flown by. Standing on the graduation stage, looking back, you see a path full of growth. Your efforts, your choices, your laughter and tears -- they all made you who you are today.

choices.text: Step forward with confidence into a new journey!
